title: Help, buildah push unusable image to registry with 2.7.1
body:
## Problem, Env

Push unusable image to `registry 2.7.1` with `buildah 1.14.9`,  `buildah 1.14.9` works fine with registry 2.6.2 and 2.5.2. 

- buildah 1.14.9  +  registry 2.5.2/2.6.2 (push works fine)
- buildah 1.14.9  +  registry 2.7.1 (push message in buildah is fine, but the image is unusable. The image info can be view via some registry-ui, but the image-tag detail can't be viewed by registry-ui)

My commands: (`bh` is a short link of `buildah`)

```bash
#login
docker_repo_url=registry-pkg.private.com:5100
docker_repo_user=root
docker_repo_pass=xxx
echo "${docker_repo_pass}" |bh login --tls-verify=false --username=${docker_repo_user} --password-stdin $docker_repo_url

target=registry-pkg.private.com:5100/ns1/err-cent7-kernel5:v3
bh bud --pull-always --build-arg TAG=v1.0.2 -t $target .
bh push --tls-verify=false $target
```

Registry without tls, but with httpdigest auth:

```dockerfile
version: '3.3'
services:
  registry:
    container_name: ci-registry
    restart: always
    #2.7.1  18 Jan 2019 · 139 commits to master
    #2.6.2  21 Jul 2017 · 561 commits to master
    #2.5.2  21 Jul 2017 · 777 commits to master
    image: registry:2.6.2
    ports:
      - 5100:5000
    volumes:
      - ./htpasswd:/htpasswd
      - ./data/:/var/lib/registry/
    environment:
      - REGISTRY_AUTH=htpasswd
      - REGISTRY_AUTH_HTPASSWD_REALM=Registry Realm
      - REGISTRY_AUTH_HTPASSWD_PATH=/htpasswd
```

My build Dockerfile:

```dockerfile
FROM registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/infrastlabs/alpine-ext 
USER root
RUN echo 666
```

comments.body:
And I find that then my built Dockerfile just use `FROM xxx`, then with nothing in the next line.

Like:

```dockerfile
FROM registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/infrastlabs/alpine-ext 
```
Instead of:

```dockerfile
FROM registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/infrastlabs/alpine-ext 
USER root
RUN echo 666
```

In this way, the image can be pushed, and be pulled.
